nodes.name: Log Discarded -3rd party Email validation failed

parameters.text: =Hey new High Value lead is arrived.Please check out the details in PDF uploaded in the google drive.

parameters.subject: Welcome Email
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Name.split(' ').first()}},

Thankyou for filling out the form.We appreciate your interest in GH Group.

To better understand your needs and discuss how we can support you, we have sent you a calendar invitation for a meeting.

Please check your email for the calendar event and confirm your availability. During the meeting, our team will walk you through our solutions and answer any questions you may have.

If the scheduled time does not work for you, feel free to reply to this email and we will be happy to arrange a more convenient time.

Best Regards,
Pavithra.

parameters.subject: Follow up Email
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('On form submission').item.json.Name.split(' ').first()}},

I just wanted to quickly check in regarding the meeting invitation we sent a few days ago.

We scheduled a time to discuss your requirements and explore how we might be able to help. If the proposed time works for you, please feel free to accept the calendar invitation.

If your schedule is tight at the moment, no problem at all—just let me know a time that works better for you and we can adjust the meeting.

Looking forward to hearing from you.


Best Regards,
Pavithra.
